export default "---\ntitle: Getter\r\nupdated: 2021-05-04T19:26:18\r\ncreated: 2019-11-04T10:24:01\r\n---\n\n意义:store的计算属性,getters里的方法并没有改变state\r\n\r\n引用方法:\r\n\r\n1.直接引用\r\n\r\n\\<h3\\>{{\\$store.getters.add}}\\</h3\\>\r\n\r\n2-3.通过computed的计算属性\r\n\r\nimport{mapGetters}from\"vuex\";\r\n\r\ncomputed:{\r\n\r\n...mapGetters(\\[\"add\"\\]),//方法2\r\n\r\ncounted(){//方法3\r\n\r\nreturnthis.\\$store.getters.add;\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n},\r\n";
