export default "---\ntitle: Vuex的配置\r\nupdated: 2019-12-09T17:21:11\r\ncreated: 2019-11-04T10:14:26\r\n---\n\n1.安装vuex:控制台 npm install vuex --save\r\n2.导入vuex:\r\n1.创建store.js\r\n\r\nimportVuefrom'vue'\r\n\r\nimportVuexfrom'vuex'\r\n\r\nVue.use(Vuex)\r\n\r\nconststore=newVuex.Store({\r\n\r\nstate:{\r\n\r\nname:'奥利弗',\r\n\r\nage:'18',\r\n\r\ncounter:1\r\n\r\n},\r\n\r\nmutations:{\r\n\r\nshowPeople(state,msg){\r\n\r\nstate.name=msg\r\n\r\n},\r\n\r\naddCounter(state,add){\r\n\r\nstate.counter+=add\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n})\r\n\r\nexportdefaultstore\r\n\r\n2.main.js 导入\r\n\r\nimportVuexfrom'vuex'\r\n\r\nimportstorefrom'./store/store'\r\n\r\nVue.use(Vuex)\r\n\r\nnewVue({\r\n\r\nel:'#app',\r\n\r\nrouter,\r\n\r\nstore,//导入仓库\r\n\r\ncomponents:{App},\r\n\r\ntemplate:'\\<App/\\>'\r\n\r\n})\r\n\r\n";
