export default "---\ntitle: 组件和路由\r\nupdated: 2019-12-23T11:59:04\r\ncreated: 2019-11-01T08:29:42\r\n---\n\n组件和路由\r\n2019年11月1日\r\n8:29\r\n\r\n**全局组件注册:**\r\n在main.js文件中\r\n\r\n导入:\r\n\r\nimportmyComponentfrom'./components/footer'\r\n\r\n注册:\r\n\r\nVue.component('firstComponent',myComponent)\r\n\r\n**全局组件使用:**\r\n\\<firstComponent\\>\\</firstComponent\\>\r\n\r\n**局部组件注册:**\r\n\r\n在页面下的script标签下:\r\n\r\nimportFootNavfrom\"../components/footer\";\r\n\r\n在export default下:\r\n\r\ncomponents:{\r\n\r\n'foot-nav':FootNav\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n**局部组件使用:**\r\n\\<foot-nav\\>\\</foot-nav\\>\r\n\r\n注意:不要使用关键字,类似footer\r\n组件的样式会加上类似\\[data-v-b45e332e\\]的选择器,该值是随机的,不能在父组件中写该选择器\r\n加强样式权重\r\n**父子组件之间传参:**\r\n父组件传值给子组件:\r\n\r\n子组件:\r\n\r\nprops:{\r\n\r\nchildValue:{\r\n\r\ntype:String,\r\n\r\ndefault:\"thisisfromchild.vue\"\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n父组件: \\<child:childValue=\"parentValue\"\\>\\</child\\>\r\n\r\n注意: 父传子参数要写到props属性中\r\n\r\n子组件传值给父组件(通过方法的参数传值):\r\n\r\n父组件: \\<child@getChildValue=\"showValue\"\\>\\</child\\>\r\n\r\n子组件: this.\\$emit(\"getChildValue\",this.dataValue);\r\n\r\n**兄弟组件之间参数:**\r\n1.兄弟组件引入相同的bus.js作为中间仓库\r\n\r\n//bus.js内容\r\n\r\nimport Vue from 'vue'\r\n\r\nexport default new Vue()\r\n\r\n2.兄弟组件都引入到父组件中\r\n\r\nimportchildfrom\"./demo_child.vue\";\r\n\r\nimportanotherfrom\"./demo_another\"\r\n\r\n3.在需要接收参数的组件的钩子函数mounted中,添加监听事件\r\n\r\nmounted:function(){\r\n\r\nlet\\_this=this;\r\n\r\nbus.\\$on(\"val\",name=\\>{\r\n\r\n\\_this.name=name;\r\n\r\n});\r\n\r\n},\r\n\r\n在另一个需要传递参数的组件中,添加方法,方法中触发事件\"val\"\r\n\r\npostName:function(){\r\n\r\nbus.\\$emit(\"val\",this.name);\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n注意: 当只需要接收一次参数时,可以写\\$once\r\n\r\nmounted:function(){\r\n\r\nlet\\_this=this;\r\n\r\nbus.\\$once(\"val\",name=\\>{\r\n\r\n\\_this.name=name;\r\n\r\n});\r\n\r\n},\r\n\r\n**路由的跳转:**\r\n路由跳转有三种方式:\r\n\r\n==\\<**li**v-**for**=\"article in articles\"@click=\"getDescribe(article.id)\"\\>==\r\n\r\n1.  ==直接带参数==\r\n\r\n==methods:==\r\n\r\n<span class=\"mark\">getDescribe(id) {  \r\n// 直接调用\\$router.push 实现携带参数的跳转  \r\nthis.\\$router.push({  \r\npath: \\`/describe/\\${id}\\`,  \r\n})</span>\r\n\r\nrouter:\r\n\r\n<span class=\"mark\">{  \r\npath: '/describe/:id',  \r\nname: 'Describe',  \r\ncomponent: Describe  \r\n}</span>\r\n\r\n新页面获取参数:\r\n\r\n==this.\\$route.params.id==\r\n\r\n1.  params带参数\r\n\r\nmethods:\r\n\r\n<span class=\"mark\">**this**.\\$router.push({  \r\nname: 'Describe',  \r\nparams: {  \r\nid: id  \r\n}  \r\n})</span>\r\n\r\nrouter:\r\n\r\n=={==\r\n\r\n==path: '/describe/:id',==\r\n\r\n==name: 'Describe',==\r\n\r\n==component: Describe==\r\n\r\n==}==\r\n\r\n新页面获取参数:\r\n\r\n==this.\\$route.params.id==\r\n1.  query带参数\r\n\r\nmethods:\r\n\r\n<span class=\"mark\">**this**.\\$router.push({  \r\npath: '/describe',  \r\nquery: {  \r\nid: id  \r\n}  \r\n})</span>\r\n\r\nrouter:\r\n\r\n<span class=\"mark\">{  \r\npath: '/describe',  \r\nname: 'Describe',  \r\ncomponent: Describe  \r\n}</span>\r\n\r\n新页面获取参数:\r\n\r\n==this.\\$route.query.id==\r\n\r\n注意:1. 新页面获取参数都是通过this.route , 而不是this.router\r\n1.  为了避免新页面刷新之后params参数消失,需要在router里加上\"/:参数\",并且,如果请求中不带有相关参数,就不显示页面.\r\n2.  query传参,写的是path,query,this.\\$route.query\r\n3.  params传参,写的是name,params,this.\\$route.params\r\n**路由通过props传参:**\r\n1.路由 router.js\r\n\r\n{\r\n\r\npath: 'calculation/',\r\n\r\nname: 'calculation',\r\n\r\ncomponent: calculation,\r\n\r\n**props: true,//**设置为true,则params的值将传到props\r\n\r\nmeta: {\r\n\r\ntitle: 'calculation'\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n2.跳转\r\n\r\nthis.\\$router.push({\r\n\r\nname: \"calculation\",\r\n\r\n**params: {**\r\n\r\n**goodsList: newList,**\r\n\r\n**totalPrice: this.totalPrice**\r\n\r\n**}**\r\n\r\n});\r\n\r\n3.新页面\r\n\r\n**props: {**\r\n\r\n**goodsList: Array,**\r\n\r\n**totalPrice: Number**\r\n\r\n**},**\r\n\r\n**使用localstorage解决页面刷新参数消失的问题**\r\ncreated () {\r\n\r\nconst tempData = localStorage.getItem(\"tempData\")\r\n\r\nif (tempData) {\r\n\r\nthis.goodsList = JSON.parse(tempData)\r\n\r\n} else {\r\n\r\nthis.goodsList = this.\\$route.params.goodsList\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\nthis.goodsList.forEach(val =\\> {\r\n\r\nthis.totalPrice += val\\[2\\] \\* val\\[3\\]\r\n\r\n})\r\n\r\nlocalStorage.setItem('tempData', JSON.stringify(this.goodsList))\r\n\r\n},\r\n\r\nbeforeDestroy () {\r\n\r\nlocalStorage.removeItem('tempData')\r\n\r\n},\r\n\r\n";
