export default "---\ntitle: promise\r\nupdated: 2020-01-09T11:40:54\r\ncreated: 2019-12-10T16:22:27\r\n---\n\n<table>\r\n<colgroup>\r\n<col style=\"width: 14%\" />\r\n<col style=\"width: 85%\" />\r\n</colgroup>\r\n<tbody>\r\n<tr class=\"odd\">\r\n<td></td>\r\n<td><p></p>\r\n<p><strong>异步处理之.Promise</strong></p>\r\n<p>doSomething()</p>\r\n<p>.then(doSomethingElse(value))</p>\r\n<p>.then(doThirdThing(newResult))</p>\r\n<p>.then(finalResult =&gt; console.log(`Got the final result: ${finalResult}`))</p>\r\n<p>.catch(failureCallback);</p>\r\n<p>注释:</p>\r\n<p>doSomething,doSomething()等异步函数通过返回一个Promise对象,从而附加回调函数来使用.</p>\r\n<p></p>\r\n<p>Promise传入一个函数作为回调函数,回调函数具有两个形参(resolve,reject);Promise对象调用.then或者.catch方法</p>\r\n<p>then() 或者catch()函数会返回一个全新的 Promise对象.</p>\r\n<p></p>\r\n<p>new Promise((resolve, reject) =&gt; {</p>\r\n<p>console.log('初始化');</p>\r\n<p>resolve(11);</p>\r\n<p>})</p>\r\n<p>.then((result) =&gt; {</p>\r\n<p>console.log(result);</p>\r\n<blockquote>\r\n<p>new Promise((resolve,reject) =&gt; {reject(12)})</p>\r\n</blockquote>\r\n<p>})</p>\r\n<p>.catch((result) =&gt; {</p>\r\n<p>console.log(result);</p>\r\n<p>})</p>\r\n<p>.then(() =&gt; {</p>\r\n<p>console.log('执行「这个」，无论前面发生了什么');</p>\r\n<p>});</p>\r\n<p></p>\r\n<p>((result) =&gt; {return new Promise((resolve,reject) =&gt; {console.log(result),resolve(result+1)})})(result)</p>\r\n<p>.then((newResult =&gt; {new Promise((resolve,reject) =&gt; {console.log(newResult),resolve(newResult+1)})}))</p>\r\n<p></p>\r\n<p></p></td>\r\n</tr>\r\n</tbody>\r\n</table>\r\n**异步处理之async,await**\r\n\r\nconst delay = ms =\\> new Promise(resolve =\\> setTimeout(resolve, ms));\r\n\r\n或者\r\n\r\nfunction timeout(ms) {\r\n\r\nreturn new Promise((resolve) =\\> {\r\n\r\nsetTimeout(resolve, ms);\r\n\r\n});\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function asyncPrint(value, ms) {\r\n\r\nawait timeout(ms);\r\n\r\nconsole.log(value);\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\nasyncPrint('hello world', 50);\r\n\r\n**通过函数只调用实现异步的处理 :**\r\n\r\nfunction f1(ms,t) {\r\n\r\nlet times = t -1;\r\n\r\nconsole.log(times);\r\n\r\nif(times\\>0){\r\n\r\nsetTimeout(() =\\> {\r\n\r\nf1(ms,times)\r\n\r\n},ms)\r\n\r\n}else {\r\n\r\nreturn 0;\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n";
