export default "---\ntitle: Canvas\r\nupdated: 2020-01-15T15:31:59\r\ncreated: 2019-12-06T08:28:38\r\n---\n\nCanvas\r\n2019年12月6日\r\n8:28\r\n\r\n实例:\r\nfunction draw(){\r\n\r\nvar x1=0.475;\r\n\r\nvar y1=1;\r\n\r\nvar x2=0.498;\r\n\r\nvar y2=1;\r\n\r\nvar x3=0.725;\r\n\r\nvar y3=0;\r\n\r\nvar x4=0.811;\r\n\r\nvar y4=0;\r\n\r\n//初始化\r\n\r\nvar width=document.documentElement.clientWidth;\r\n\r\nvar height=width\\*0.212;\r\n\r\nvar crt=document.getElementById(\"myCanvas\");\r\n\r\nvar img=document.getElementById(\"login-bg\");\r\n\r\nvar canCon=crt.getContext('2d');\r\n\r\ncrt.setAttribute(\"width\",width);\r\n\r\ncrt.setAttribute(\"height\",height);\r\n\r\n//设置随窗口大小变化\r\n\r\nwindow.onresize=function(){\r\n\r\nwidth=document.documentElement.clientWidth;\r\n\r\nheight=width\\*0.212;\r\n\r\ncrt.setAttribute(\"width\",width);\r\n\r\ncrt.setAttribute(\"height\",height);\r\n\r\n};\r\n\r\nsetInterval(function(){\r\n\r\n////绘制透明层\r\n\r\n//canCon.fillStyle=\"rgba(0,0,0,0.02)\";\r\n\r\n//canCon.fillRect(0,0,width,height);\r\n\r\n//擦除画布\r\n\r\ncanCon.drawImage(img,0,0,width,height);\r\n\r\n//第一个点\r\n\r\ncanCon.beginPath();\r\n\r\ncanCon.fillStyle=\"rgb(252,192,89)\";\r\n\r\ncanCon.arc(x1\\*width,y1\\*height,4,0,Math.PI\\*2);\r\n\r\ncanCon.fill();\r\n\r\n//第二个点\r\n\r\ncanCon.beginPath();\r\n\r\ncanCon.fillStyle=\"rgb(252,192,89)\";\r\n\r\ncanCon.arc(x2\\*width,y2\\*height,4,0,Math.PI\\*2);\r\n\r\ncanCon.fill();\r\n\r\n//第三个点\r\n\r\ncanCon.beginPath();\r\n\r\ncanCon.fillStyle=\"rgb(252,192,89)\";\r\n\r\ncanCon.arc(x3\\*width,y3\\*height,4,0,Math.PI\\*2);\r\n\r\ncanCon.fill();\r\n\r\n//第四个点\r\n\r\ncanCon.beginPath();\r\n\r\ncanCon.fillStyle=\"rgb(252,192,89)\";\r\n\r\ncanCon.arc(x4\\*width,y4\\*height,4,0,Math.PI\\*2);\r\n\r\ncanCon.fill();\r\n\r\n//第1个点判断\r\n\r\nif(y1\\<=0){\r\n\r\nx1=0.475;\r\n\r\ny1=1;\r\n\r\n}elseif(y1\\<=0.460){\r\n\r\nx1+=0.00044;\r\n\r\ny1-=0.00178\r\n\r\n}else{\r\n\r\nx1-=0.0001;\r\n\r\ny1-=0.00178\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n//第2个点判断\r\n\r\nif(y2\\<=0){\r\n\r\nx2=0.498;\r\n\r\ny2=1;\r\n\r\n}elseif(y2\\<=0.51){\r\n\r\nx2+=0.00043;\r\n\r\ny2-=0.00178\r\n\r\n}else{\r\n\r\nx2-=0.0001;\r\n\r\ny2-=0.00178\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n//第3个点判断\r\n\r\nif(y3\\>=1){\r\n\r\nx3=0.725;\r\n\r\ny3=0;\r\n\r\n}elseif(y3\\<=0.478){\r\n\r\nx3+=0.00029;\r\n\r\ny3+=0.00178\r\n\r\n}else{\r\n\r\nx3-=0.00029;\r\n\r\ny3+=0.00178\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n//第4个点判断\r\n\r\nif(y4\\>=1){\r\n\r\nx4=0.811;\r\n\r\ny4=0;\r\n\r\n}elseif(y4\\<=0.42){\r\n\r\nx4+=0.00029;\r\n\r\ny4+=0.00178\r\n\r\n}else{\r\n\r\nx4-=0.00028;\r\n\r\ny4+=0.00178\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n},10)\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\ndraw();\r\n\r\n如何绘制彗星样式?\r\n1\\.\r\n\r\n////绘制透明层,覆盖旧样式\r\n\r\n//canCon.fillStyle=\"rgba(0,0,0,0.02)\";\r\n\r\n//canCon.fillRect(0,0,width,height);\r\n\r\n2.使用shadowColor和shadowBlur\r\n\r\n3.建立多个半径变化的圆作为彗星的尾迹\r\n";
