export default "---\ntitle: Vuex在组件中的引用\r\nupdated: 2019-11-04T11:10:35\r\ncreated: 2019-11-04T10:18:09\r\n---\n\n1.直接引用\r\n\\<!--\\<h3\\>{{this.\\$store.state.counter}}\\</h3\\>--\\>\r\n\r\n2.通过computed的计算属性引用\r\n\\<!--\\<h3\\>{{count}}\\</h3\\>--\\>\r\n\r\n//computed:{\r\n\r\n//count(){\r\n\r\n//returnthis.\\$store.state.counter;\r\n\r\n//}\r\n\r\n//}\r\n3.通过**mapState**的对象来赋值\r\n\\<h3\\>{{name}}\\</h3\\>\r\n\r\n\\<h3\\>{{age}}\\</h3\\>\r\n\r\ncomputed:{\r\n\r\n...mapState({\r\n\r\nname:state=\\>state.name,\r\n\r\nage:state=\\>state.age\r\n\r\n})\r\n\r\n},\r\n\r\n或者:\r\n\r\ncomputed:mapState({\r\n\r\nname:state=\\>state.name,\r\n\r\nage:state=\\>state.age\r\n\r\n}),\r\n";
